beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Arsenal vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Demi-finales - Retour
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en: Arsenal remain unbeaten against in the Atlético Madrid in the UEFA Champions League, winning 4-0 at the Emirates and drawing 1-1 at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano Stadium this season. Only two other managers have gone unbeaten in their first three games against Atlético boss Diego Simeone in the competition: Carlo Ancelotti and Maurizio Sarri. Winless in their two games against Arsenal this season, Atlético Madrid last faced an opponent 3+ times in a single campaign without managing a victory in 2022-23, versus Real Madrid.
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: Arsenal reste invaincu contre l'Atlético Madrid en UEFA Champions League, s'imposant 4-0 à l'Emirates et faisant match nul 1-1 au stade Riyadh Air Metropolitano cette saison.

beIN SPORTS 1.title: بايرن ميونخ vs باريس سان جيرمان - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - نصف النهائي - ذهاب
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: باريس سان جيرمان 5-4 بايرن ميونيخ في مباراة الذهاب كانت أعلى مباراة في نصف نهائي كأس أوروبا منذ فوز أينتراخت فرانكفورت على رينجرز 6-3 في 1959-60.
beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Bayern Munich vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Demi-finales - Retour
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en: Paris SG 5-4 Bayern Munich in the first leg was the highest scoring European Cup semi-final match since Eintracht Frankfurt beat Rangers 6-3 in 1959-60. Across both legs, in major European competition the most goals in any semi-final was in that Frankfurt – Rangers tie, which ended 12-4 on aggregate to the German side. In UEFA Champions League history, only one team has ever scored five goals in a knockout match and then been eliminated in that tie, which was Manchester City against Monaco in the last 16 in 2016-17.
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: Le Paris SG 5-4 Bayern Munich au match aller a été la demi-finale de Coupe d'Europe la plus marquante depuis que l'Eintracht Francfort a battu les Rangers 6-3 en 1959-60.

beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en: Saudi club Al-Ahli FC secured their status as Asia’s top club by winning the 2025/2026 AFC Champions League Elite title, defeating Japan's Machida Zelvia 1-0 in the final on April 25, 2026, at King Abdullah Sports City Stadium in Jeddah. beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Liverpool vs Chelsea - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
beIN SPORTS 1.title: ليفربول vs تشيلسي - الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز 2025/2026 الأسبوع 36
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: خسر ليفربول آخر مباراتين له في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز أمام تشيلسي، وهو نفس العدد الذي خسره في آخر 20 مباراة. وخسر آخر ثلاث مباريات متتالية أمام البلوز بين ديسمبر 2013 ونوفمبر 2014. بعد فوزه 2-1 على ملعب ستامفورد بريدج في أكتوبر، يتطلع تشيلسي إلى إكمال ثنائية الدوري على ليفربول للمرة الأولى منذ 2013-2014.
beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Liverpool vs Chelsea - Premier League anglaise 2025/2026 Semaine 36
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en: Liverpool have lost their last two Premier League games against Chelsea, as many as they had in their previous 20. They last lost three in a row against the Blues between December 2013 and November 2014. Following their 2-1 win at Stamford Bridge in October, Chelsea are looking to complete the league double over Liverpool for the first time since 2013-14.
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: Liverpool a perdu ses deux derniers matches de Premier League contre Chelsea, autant que lors de ses 20 précédents. Ils ont perdu trois fois de suite contre les Blues entre décembre 2013 et novembre 2014. Après leur victoire 2-1 à Stamford Bridge en octobre, Chelsea cherche à réaliser le doublé en championnat contre Liverpool pour la première fois depuis 2013-14.

beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Sunderland vs Manchester United - Premier League anglaise 2025/2026 Journée 36
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en: Sunderland have won just three of their 33 Premier League games against Manchester United, with their 24 defeats against the Red Devils their most against any opponent in the competition. Manchester United have lost just one of their 15 visits to the Stadium of Light to face Sunderland in the Premier League, going down 2-1 in February 2016.
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: Sunderland n'a remporté que trois de ses 33 matches de Premier League contre Manchester United, avec ses 24 défaites contre les Red Devils, son plus grand nombre contre n'importe quel adversaire de la compétition.

beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Manchester City vs Brentford - Premier League anglaise 2025/2026 Semaine 36
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en: Though they’ve only failed to score in one of their nine Premier League games against Brentford, Man City’s average of 1.4 goals per game against the Bees  is their lowest against any opponent they’ve faced under Pep Guardiola. Brentford have lost three of their four Premier League away games against Manchester City, with the exception being a 2-1 win in November 2022.
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: Bien qu’ils n’aient réussi à marquer que lors d’un de leurs neuf matchs de Premier League contre Brentford, la moyenne de 1,4 but par match de Man City contre les Bees est la plus basse contre tous les adversaires qu’ils ont affrontés sous Pep Guardiola.

beIN SPORTS 8.original_title: Aix vs Tremblay - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
beIN SPORTS 8.title: إيكس vs تريمبلاي - LNH Division 1 - الدوري الفرنسي لكرة اليد
beIN SPORTS 8.desc: انغمس في إثارة كرة اليد الفرنسية مع Liqui Moly Starligue، القسم الأول من LNH سابقًا. تأسس هذا الحدث في الدوري الممتاز عام 1952، ويضم 16 فريقًا من أفضل الفرق يتقاتلون من أجل المجد.
beIN SPORTS 8.title_fr: Aix vs Tremblay - LNH Division 1 - Starligue Française de Handball
beIN SPORTS 8.desc_en: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s  14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.
beIN SPORTS 8.desc_fr: Plongez dans l'effervescence du handball français avec la Liqui Moly Starligue, anciennement LNH Division 1. Créée en 1952, cet événement de première division rassemble 16 meilleures équipes qui se battent pour la gloire.

beIN SPORTS 5.original_title: Fulham vs A.F.C. Bournemouth - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
beIN SPORTS 5.title: فولهام ضد الاتحاد الآسيوي.
beIN SPORTS 5.desc: فاز فولهام في اثنتين فقط من مواجهاته التسعة في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز مع بورنموث - 1-0 خارج أرضه في أبريل 2019 و3-1 على أرضه في فبراير 2024. فاز بورنموث في آخر مباراتين له في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز ضد فولهام.
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_en: Fulham have won just two of their nine Premier League meetings with Bournemouth  – 1-0 away in April 2019 and 3-1 at home in February 2024. Bournemouth have won their last two Premier League games against Fulham. They’re looking to complete the double over them for the first time in the competition, last doing so in any division in 2014-15.
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_fr: Fulham n'a remporté que deux de ses neuf rencontres de Premier League avec Bournemouth – 1-0 à l'extérieur en avril 2019 et 3-1 à domicile en février 2024. Bournemouth a remporté ses deux derniers matchs de Premier League contre Fulham.
